query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[0].pexelsQuery') as scene1, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[1].pexelsQuery') as scene2, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[2].pexelsQuery') as scene3, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[3].pexelsQuery') as scene4, JSON_EXTRACT(scenes, '$[4].pexelsQuery') as scene5 FROM videoScripts WHERE id = 480003;
